training_status: powerlifter, 3 years lifting experience, upper/lower split (2 days upper, 2 days lower)

benefits.description: preserve muscle and strength during caloric deficit cut from 215 to 185 lbs
body recomposition while cutting, accelerate fat loss while maintaining lean mass
improved sleep to help maintain muscle during cut (currently taking trazodone for insomnia)
cut faster to reach bulk phase more quickly

side_effects.description: concerned about heart enlargement as possibility with GH peptides
concerned about liver enlargement and organ hypertrophy with GH peptides

protocol_notes: 3 months cycle, 5 days on / 2 days off protocol. Goal: cut from 215 lbs to 185 lbs (target 12-13% body fat). Deficit: 500-750 calories. Currently walks 10k steps daily, does not drink alcohol, on mirtazapine (for appetite/sleep) and trazodone (for insomnia). Has history of body dysmorphia. Works with coach and therapist who support peptide use. Blood work pending at time of post.
